title: Serena OmniTag / Msg⛛ Canonical Tag Schema
description: Canonical tag set for the DevMentor / Terminal Depths / NuSyQ ecosystem. All memory entries, events, and observations are tagged using this schema. Tags are stored as JSON arrays of single-key objects: [{"type":"observation"},{"agent":"SERENA"}].

agent.description: Codename of the agent that created this entry

ctx.description: Context layer within the ΨΞΦΩ architecture

surface.description: Development surface where the entry originated

file.description: Relative file path the entry relates to

kind.description: For code_chunk entries: the AST node type

walk_id.description: Walk journal entry this chunk belongs to

envelope.description: Standard event envelope used for agent-to-agent messages and chronicle entries

structure.[Msg⛛{X}]: message identity (X = sequential or UUID fragment)

ψξφω_mapping.Ψ: Flow / intake — Walker, raw signal from repository
ψξφω_mapping.Ω: Core / compression — MemoryPalace, entropy held in suspension
ψξφω_mapping.Ξ: Recursion / refinement — ask(), explain(), self-correcting loops
ψξφω_mapping.Φ: Phase / sync — cross-surface coherence, surface_bridge, tag consistency
